description: Style Note puma has its roots in Germany, and the brand is known for its minimalistic design in high-end athletic shoes. A jogging and walking shoe, this Puma Track cat sporty shoe is replete with features to enhance performance. Team this with performance clothes when hitting the track or the gym, or simply pair it with jeans and t-shirts.  Product Details Black shoe with synthetic upper, synthetic and nubuck overlays, reinforced overlay and central lace-ups Padded tongue and inner Thick rubber midsole TPU outsole with textured grooves and branding on the midfoot Material and Care Synthetic, nubuck Wipe surface with a damp, clean cloth to remove dust Do not machine wash
